zh.lifeSummary: 當Ade De Rollancourt於1212年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特時，她的父親Charles Rollancourt38歲，母親Isabeau de Brimeau32歲。她於1228年與Jean I D'Ollehain結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1250年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷斯尼可吉萊-多爾芒享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a nickname from a word denoting something round and lumpish. It is one of several given names that owe their origin to their use for a character in  Margaret Mitchell's  novel Gone with the Wind (  1936 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ade De Rollancourt was born in 1212, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Charles Rollancourt, was 38 and her mother, Isabeau de Brimeau, was 32. She married Jean I D'Ollehain in 1228. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1250, in Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ade De Rollancourt est née en 1212, à Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Charles Rollancourt, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabeau de Brimeau, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Jean I D'Ollehain en 1228. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1250, à Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ade De Rollancourt 1212 in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles Rollancourt 38 und ihre Mutter Isabeau de Brimeau 32. Sie hat 1228 Jean I D'Ollehain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1250 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ade De Rollancourt è nata il nel 1212 nel Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Charles Rollancourt, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Isabeau de Brimeau, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Jean I D'Ollehain nel 1228. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1250, nel Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ade De Rollancourtが1212年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスロランコウルトで生まれた時，父Charles Rollancourtは38歳，母Isabeau de Brimeauは32歳であった。1228年にJean I D'Ollehainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1250年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレスニコウルト-レ-ドルメンで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ade De Rollancourt(이)가 1212년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles Rollancourt(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabeau de Brimeau(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1228년 Jean I D'Ollehain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레스니쿠르트-레-도멘에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ade De Rollancourt nasceu em 1212, em Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Charles Rollancourt, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau de Brimeau, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean I D'Ollehain em 1228. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1250, em Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ade De Rollancourt родилась в 1212 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Charles Rollancourt было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabeau de Brimeau, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean I D'Ollehain в 1228 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1250 г. в местности фресникоурт-ле-долмен, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ade De Rollancourt nació en 1212, en Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Charles Rollancourt, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Isabeau de Brimeau, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Jean I D'Ollehain en 1228. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1250, en Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 38 años.
